'''Delpho''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] with the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]]. He was a member of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Salle Serpa]]'s [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]], which [[Battle of Ossus (Second Galactic Civil War)|occupied]] the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. In the ensuing [[Battle of Ossus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Ossus]], Delpho was responsible for pumping [[coma gas]] into [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] room; however, she was able to overpower him and knock him unconscious.<ref name="Inferno" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
